caption: The video captures a formal gathering, likely a legislative or parliamentary session, with numerous individuals seated in rows of wooden desks. The attendees are dressed in a variety of traditional and formal attire, reflecting cultural diversity. Some individuals are actively engaged, with one person in the center holding up a smartphone, possibly recording or taking a photo. The atmosphere appears to be serious and attentive, as most participants are looking in the same direction, suggesting they are focused on a speaker or event not visible in the frame. The setting is well-lit, indicating an indoor venue designed for official proceedings.
